description: Smooth and laid-back, perfect for cruising the boardwalk at golden hour.
Wide handlebars and a cushy seat for the most relaxed ride on the coast.
Compact and lightweight — ideal for shorter riders exploring beach paths.
Bright and cheerful with a vintage fender and wicker basket included.
A classic step-through frame with seven speeds for those longer coastal rides.
Turn heads on the promenade with this bold, eye-catching cruiser.
